variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16554 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16554 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16554 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 28 357 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16554
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: FIL Filter HP 4516 K | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16554
variants.description: Genuine FIL Filter HP 4516 K. Easy to install and replace, the HP 4516 K is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4894KM Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16554
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4894KM axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
